query: I have a zotero-docai-pipeline export with zotero_file_url values, can you ingest these into Page Index?
why: Zotero-derived URL ingestion should trigger this wrapper skill.

query: Use my Zotero attachment manifest to add these PDFs to Page Index, but check for duplicates first.
why: Manifest-driven Zotero ingestion with duplicate checking should trigger this skill.

query: I have these Zotero attachment URLs and want them in Page Index.
why: Zotero attachment URL ingestion should trigger this skill.

query: Please ingest this public PDF URL into Page Index after checking whether it already exists.
why: Pure URL ingest without Zotero context should go to pageindex-ingest-paper-urls instead.

query: Find this paper in Page Index and tell me whether it exists.
why: Paper finding only should trigger pageindex-find-papers.

query: I want to download this Zotero PDF to disk.
why: Downloading from Zotero is out of scope for this skill and belongs to zotero-docai-pipeline.
